name: the-help
description: Kathryn Stockett's The Help — a powerful novel about Black maids, a white journalist, and the courage to tell the truth in 1960s Mississippi.
useCase: Finding courage to speak, building cross-boundary friendships, standing against injustice, storytelling as resistance, holding onto dignity.
knownRisks: The novel has been criticized for its portrayal of Black dialect and perspective
Stockett is a white author writing Black characters — some readers object to this
The 'white savior' framing has been debated — handle with nuance
